prompt: /update-project --project test-project --session-summary "Today I decided to switch from random splitting to scaffold-aware splitting. Random split is invalid because Tanimoto analysis showed 15% near-duplicates that would leak between train and test sets. I'll use the Bemis-Murcko scaffold approach."

assertions.text: decisions-log.md contains a new entry with scaffold-aware splitting and the near-duplicate rationale
open-questions.md shows splitting question as [CLOSED] with an answer
Skill shows a diff preview and asks for confirmation before writing
results-log.md and methods.md are not modified
